headline: DRI Q1 Deep Dive: Menu Innovation and Brand Execution Drive Steady Growth
summary: Restaurant company Darden (NYSE:DRI) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 5.9% year on year to $3.35 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.95 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: These Analysts Increase Their Forecasts On Darden Restaurants Following Upbeat Results
summary: Darden Restaurants (NYSE: DRI) beats expectations with Q3 earnings of $2.95 per share and $3.345 billion in sales. Analysts raise price targets.
